reviews.name: Sandra Ng
reviews.text:
I went to get my braces done and was initially told that after the installation, I would only need to return once a month for regular check-ups and adjustments.
However, within 2 days of getting the braces, one of the brackets came off. I went back to the dentist to fix it, and they asked whether I had eaten anything hard. I explained that I had only been eating blended porridge because my teeth were aching and I had avoided solid food completely.
Over the following weeks, I had to return another 3-4 times because different brackets kept falling off - around 4 more in total. One of the brackets that had already been repaired after the initial installation even came off again after being fixed. At first, the dentist suggested it might be due to my bite and decided to add cement bite blocks to prevent me from biting down on the brackets. This explanation did not fully make sense to me because the brackets were coming off from different teeth each time.
After the bite blocks were added, the dentist then mentioned that the issue could actually be related to the cement/adhesive used during the initial installation. I was told to be patient because I might need to keep returning whenever a bracket came loose.
Within the same week, another bracket came off, and the dentist admitted that the problem was indeed due to the cement used.
Now, today, another 2 brackets have come off again. This will already be my 6th or 7th return visit, despite originally being told I would only need monthly appointments.

reviews.name: Kavita Sandhu
reviews.text: I had an excellent experience at Putra Heights Dental Clinic with Dr. Lim Ju Ann. She is incredibly patient and gentle, making sure her patients are comfortable throughout the procedure. The dental treatment was so smoothly done that I hardly felt any discomfort. I was even surprised by how painless the anesthesia jab was, I didn’t feel a thing. Her skills are truly remarkable and the entire process felt flawless. I’ve brought my family here for routine check-ups and treatments and everyone has always spoken highly of her. But this was my first time experiencing her care firsthand and I can confidently say she is outstanding. Additionally, the treatment fees are very reasonable, making quality dental care accessible for many. I believe that if people prefer not to go to government clinics due to long wait times, Putra Heights Dental Clinic is a great alternative. Overall, Dr. Lim Ju Ann is the best dentist I’ve ever encountered. Highly recommended!!

reviews.name: Andrea Tan
reviews.text:
Been going to Dr Hor since for almost 20years. Was recommended by a family member. Fees are very reasonable.
Dentist very patient & calm when he does his work.

He will explain the procedures & allow me time to decide if we should proceed.

Among the procedures I had done:

* Teeth scaling

* Had my ingrown wisdom tooth removed by surgery.

* Tooth crowned.

I am actually scared to go dentist.
With Dr Hor.. he is very good in keeping me calm.  If I am in pain, he will pause & allow me some time to recollect myself.  Gargle, spit. Then he continues with his work. Really appreciate his patience.

Trusted dentist.  Highly recommended.  👍🏻

接待员非常不尊重顾客，上一次我只是询问可不可以拿mc纸而已，为什么态度要这么差？我当下头很晕，整个人已经开始觉得天旋地转了，这位印度女招待员和印度男招待员您的态度让人非常心寒，我谅解您怀着孕，但也不能这样对待顾客啊！！摆臭脸就算了为什么要不耐烦并且粗鲁的对待顾客？如果我们没有需要请问会过来吗？如果你那么不耐烦请不要在这里浪费资源谢谢您🙂！我真的非常愤怒，为什么看个医生也要受委屈！我不想给星但是要评论没办法，我会给负五星甚至更多！

reviews.name: aisyah nabila
reviews.text:
Last night, i went to the clinic for the first time and arrived around 9:40pm-ish. I was the last patient because they're about to close at 10pm to request a Medical Leave for today, Monday. I walked to the clinic because i live at main place's residences while being sick, early syptoms of fever and i also had flu yesterday's morning. The two female receiptionist did not smile or greet me at all, the moment i stepped in. One of the receiptionist even handed me a paper to write my latest address in a disrespectful tone.

After i waited for awhile, the doctor in charge already called my name to consult with her which was Dr. Monessha A/P Sooriyamoorthy. The doctor actually peeped through the door between her room and the receiptionist workspace, rudely glared at me and ignore my smile also because i entered just before they were closing up. I did explained to the doctor that i have a psychiatric condition, diagnosed properly, i have the medical record documents both hardcopy and softcopy. I explained to the doctor, I cannot own a lot of medications because of my risky behaviour and trauma towards any pill-shaped medication. The doctor even asked me to repeat my words in a disrecpectful way by saying "Excuse me?' after i innocently explained that i have three mental disabilities disorders. I demanded to the doctor, not giving me any medication and still insist giving me paracetamol for my fever. She even wanted to give medication for my flu, which i also refused because I have every right to cross out any medication. The doctor is unfriendly, gives me a negative vibe. After the consultation settled around 9:50 pm, the receiptionist called out my name for billing, the doctor proceed giving me paracetamol, two papan of them. I informed them, i already told the doctor i cannot have more than one papan, the receiptionist didn't apologise at all. I personally don't want to own any pills because of the history i had before and i don't consume any medication for my psychiatric condition anymore, starting March 2025.

The bill was issued and i asked them nicely if i can wait for awhile because my father wanted to transfer me the amount for the bill and fyi, my father was driving last night. Obviously, i had to wait for awhile so that my father can stop by anywhere to transfer money to my bank account. The receiptionist not only pressured me to pay but proceed telling me to call my father while he was driving, which is very dangerous for my father's safety also. By the way, the receiptionist asked me three times when can i pay which i already explained to both receiptionists that my father was driving and i don't have any money to proceed the payment. After few minutes, i received the amount and proceed my payment, requested a receipt and the receiptionist was refilling the A4 paper which i have to wait for it to be settled also? Unbelievable. The receipt also had nothing stated on it, empty space with only charged for RM50 which i have no clue how much for which and which.

Overall, this was the most disrespectful clinic i ever encountered in my entire life. I will never step my foot here again, i will lodge a complaint against this clinic to Kementerian Kesihatan Malaysia.

reviews.text: If the doctor consistently arrives at 8:30 a.m., it would be more appropriate to state the clinic's operating hours as beginning at 8:30 a.m. rather than 8:00 a.m. Asking patients to wait for 30 minutes because the doctor is delayed by traffic is not ideal. Traffic conditions are generally predictable, and sufficient travel time should be planned to ensure patients are seen according to the advertised operating hours.

I’ve been a regular patient at this clinic, but I’ve noticed that the doctors seem to change quite often. A few days ago, I visited due to a fever, and the doctor advised me to take a blood test for dengue. I’ve had many blood tests in the past, but this is the first time I’ve experienced bruising afterward.

I did mention to the doctor that I’m afraid of needles, but the blood draw didn’t seem to be done properly as I felt pain while the needle was being inserted. The bruise is still present even after 5 days, FYI.

reviews.name: Eric Fang
reviews.text: This is most incredible dental service I had never been. Dr. Tan save my teeth big time, the story is that I had bleeding and pain and my US Dentists, two different ones told me the infection was at root and I have to do root surgery which they did and the pain did not stop, then the doctor said they need to pull my bad teeth, I was skeptical and by chance I was visiting Malaysia and came to Dr. Tan’s clinic for consultation, he did exam and concluded that it is my gum not the root, and my teeth is fine and that all I need is to go back to see a gum specialist and it should be fine and do not need to pull my teeth. I followed his instructions and went back to Houston found one really good Gum specialist Dr. Thomas Wright. And guess what? Dr. Thomas Wright confirmed Dr. Tan’s assessment and since then I have been going to Dr. Wright for my gum and cleaning and to this day, my gum is healthy and I am so happy I saved my teeth based on Dr. Tan’s assessment and recommendations! This is highly recommended place for your dental services!

reviews.text:
Highly recommend William Dental USJ!

I’ve had a really good experience here, especially with Dr. William, who has a very gentle approach and great bedside manner. Dental visits usually make me quite tense, but he explains everything clearly and makes the whole process comfortable. It helps that he has a very gentle touch too.

A big thank you as well to Nurse Molley, who has been super accommodating and responsive from the start. She helped me plan my visits, kept track of my scaling schedule, and always replies quickly with such a friendly tone. Really appreciate the effort.

The service feels personal, organised and genuinely caring. I’ll be sticking with this clinic from now on. Highly recommended if you want a team that’s professional, patient and easy to deal with.

title: Lee Dental Surgery
address: Taipan Business Center, No 18A1st Floor, Jalan USJ 10/1E, UEP Subang Jaya, Selangor, 47620 Subang Jaya, Malaysia

reviews.name: Jean Michele Lee
reviews.text:
A root canal goes rogue. Swollen left cheek, not much pain but I knew something was brewing. I knew I had to do something before my appointment with another dentist on tuesday.
Going to Lee Dental was really a lucky choice, closest to where I live in the USJ area.
Aini, the receptionist was pleasant and kind and we ended up having a lovely conversation. Dr Leong was sympathetic and so understanding. She assessed the situation, scrutinised my teeth (apparently its procedural for them to have a record of status of teeth etc, I thought that to be super cool). She dispensed a
prescription for antibiotics to stem the infection till my appointment.
It was a really nice experience on a Sunday morning. It put my mind at ease and I will definitely consider going back for my yearly scalings.

reviews.name: E.T. Teoh
reviews.text:
Even the strongest go weak at the knees when they visit a Dentist and that was exactly what my Dad felt when he needed Dr Lee to work on him after an unfortunate fall. He sustained a very deep gash in his upper lips that required suturing.

So here's the thing...my Dad has a thing about dentists (I know, don't we all). PTSD you could say so he would avoid one like the plague. But on that very day, his lifelong PTSD was no longer after Dr Lee's hands graced his wounds like the God-tier Dentist that he is.

My Dad was not only in awe over how remarkably pain-free the entire procedure was but also how miraculously smooth the post-procedure / recovery phase has been. If that wasn't good enough, Dr Lee personally followed up with a call a couple days later to check in on my Dad, making sure he was fine!

Dr Lee, from the bottom of our hearts, we thank you and your line of very caring, friendly and professional staff. If I may say, you and your team are truly an asset in our dentistry community.

And for those who need but are worried sick over visiting a dentist, please do yourself a favor and pay Dr Lee a visit.

Absolute GAME-CHANGER!

reviews.name: Katherine T
reviews.text: Always a good experience here! Dr Dennis is also super patient, knowledgable and gives detailed explanations to every questions asked. The assistant nurses and receptionist was also very welcoming. Thank youu to Dr Dennis and the Lee Dental Team for the pleasant experience always!! :))

My latest visit to Lee Dental was another smooth experience. I didn't feel any pain at all when the tooth extraction process was done. LA was professionally done, too, which made the tooth extraction painless. Good job to Dr. Lee and his team!

reviews.name: TP Teng
reviews.text: I am sorry I have to give this 1 Star rating. I went to to consult Dr Lesley yesterday on my wisdom tooth and she explained everything very clearly and after thinking about it later in the day I decided to do the procedure and I started to request for appointment from the clinic and until now, there is no response and I assume the clinic is not interested to do this procedure. If this is the case, at least have the courtesy to inform me and not let me waiting like a fool. Also with this type of attitude I am worry that if the procedure is done and there is an emergency, I will be be able to treated immediately.

reviews.name: raghav
reviews.text:
About a year ago I was attended to by a lady doctor. I believe her name is Dr. Shu. I couldn't remember her name then.
She was gentle and calmly explained the process prior to and as she was performing the extraction. She used only gel. It was surprisingly painless! My phobia was almost gone...almost.
Then yesterday I (quite) bravely went to get a tooth extraction again. I admit that I delayed a bit but thought about my pleasant experience with Dr. Shu and proceeded.
What followed was A NIGHTMARISH EXPERIENCE!
I insisted on a lady doctor but couldn't recall her name at that moment.
For some very strange reason, the receptionist and someone else avoided my request and sent me to a young guy (Joshua) who was waiting for me.
I was in great pain and reluctantly proceeded. What followed was a disaster..A horrible  NIGHTMARE!
After applying the gel and around 3-4 injections later he attempted to extract my tooth (molar). The pain was extremely EXCRUCIATING!!
I made a sound of pain - total pain. It was like extracting my tooth without any anesthetic!
He then told me he'll "top-up" and continued to apply extra  gel and another 3-4 injections.
Then said there'll be no pain and began extracting my tooth.
The pain was SO INTENSE that I almost passed out.
My phobia immediately returned. From then on it was fear.
When I returned home I began thinking why it hurt me so much. It dawned on me that he extracted my tooth about less than 10 seconds after the injections.
Shouldn't be have waited for the anesthetic to take effect before he roughly extracted my tooth??
I find it all so strange. The second worse factor is my phobia is now even worse.
He also said that if my tooth was infected and that he'll give me anti-biotics. It was but I never was prescribed any anti-biotic. So Dr. Shu, please look into this matter as it was a harrowing experience and I do not wish any one else who has a phobia to go through this nightmare.
My cheek is still swollen. I can only hope it's normal.

reviews.name: 许丽屏
reviews.text: 之前常去的牙科诊所，最后几次令我很失望😞，最失望的是牙医的不诚实，觉得自己被欺骗了。后来，看到这家佳护牙科好评很高，就抱着试试的心情。果然这家诊所好评高是真的，我亲自体验到了😁。我一连几次见过陈舒雯医生和林淑媚医生。两位牙医经验丰富，技术精湛，操作轻柔。整个補牙过程都很顺利也不大痛😄。诊所员工也很友善，礼貌。我强烈推荐大家去这家诊所!

Then i need to pay for your so called consultation when i just wanna know the price. Then refuse to talk if there is video and threaten me to call police. Im not poor or petty but ur trick is disgusting. I can pay for the consultation if i really want to consult but ur trick is disgusting

reviews.name: irza shahril mohd razali
reviews.text:
To summarize in one word, the services and care I received during my procedure at this clinic was "Excellent".

After enduring for about a week of jaw and tooth ache, the pain got too much to handle on a Saturday afternoon and was recommended this place by my mother. Got my first checkup on the same day and was prescribed medication to reduce the pain. The issue turns out to be a half rotten wisdom tooth (upper gums) and an appointment was set for the following day.

The next day, after exchanging pleasantries Dr. Nacha started the procedure. There was no pain what so ever due to the anesthetics but the pressure felt and sounds I heard was nerve wreaking. My wisdom tooth had been reduced to a "U" shaped mess and the removal was time consuming to say the least. Overall, the extraction took over 2 hours to complete without surgery but required some stiches to close the gaping hole left in my gums.

Dr. Nacha was thoughtful and caring throughout the procedure and I will definitely be recommending this place too after this. Many thanks to her.

11 May - Went for dental filling, scalling and checkup on my gums health. Dr. Nacha is as lovely and caring as always. Went home with 5 fillings and feeling much better. Many thanks!

reviews.text: Got my braces done here few years ago. I think I got to change my braces colour less than 5 times in the span of 3 years? It's not the fact that i didnt get to choose the colour that pisses me off, it's just that my mouth just felt super filthy its disgusting. I went to the appointments EVERY month but he didnt change my braces band at all. Mine was pink at the start and it turned to freaking yellow after 8 month. Yeah 8 months of not changing my band ew, and when I had to wear the powerchain, he put in a transparent one for me. And when I ate it turned yellow. Omg i just got a flashback of how horrible my teeth must've look with all those filth in my mouth. Go to nice smile dental clinic in Taipan guys, its SO much better and I bet the doctor isnt as stingy as this one. (because what other reason is there for not letting me choose my powerchain band besides that the doctor is super stingy? I paid A LOT for my braces okay) ugh if i can rewind i would definitely get my braces done somewhere else.

reviews.text: Arrived for the first time…parking was a breeze and  registration was quick and easy and then Dr Rashpal work his magic…quick and painless scaling and polishing…reasonabled priced too!Kuddo’s to the good job done…my wife and myself are very satisfied with the professionalism and work done!Will come back again!

reviews.name: Mr6eleven
reviews.text:
Tq Dr Balqis and assistants for their professionalism and sense of humour.
Very clean and relaxing environment, almost fell asleep while waiting for my turn.

Will i recommend to others?
Highly Recommended

Will i return?
Definitely

reviews.name: G5 Ng Ming-yan
reviews.text: Dr Rashpal is super friendly and efficient. Walks you through the whole process and makes the session comfortable and pretty quick. Thank u, doc! 🦷

reviews.name: Don Tan
reviews.text: The Dentist @ QHC has been our family go-to-dentists for a few years. Dr Rashpall and Dr Ang are very patient, gentle and skilled. The clinic environment is very comfortable even if we need to wait, nonetheless, the scheduled appointmentsnare usually timely unless there are emergency cases.

reviews.text: Experience dentist with reasonable price

address: No 6 ( GROUND FLOOR, Jalan USJ 4/6b, Usj 4, 47600 Subang Jaya, Selangor, Malaysia

reviews.name: Ming Thum
reviews.text: This my first time here ,I’m very satisfied with Dr Saw services, he is very patient and gentle,the process is very relax .And the price is reasonable .

reviews.name: Ibrahim Rominor
reviews.text: Best service! Thank you Dr Saw!

reviews.name: Aila Dalilah
reviews.text:
Came here recently for a root canal and had a really good experience. The doctor did a great job and was very gentle and caring throughout the whole process.

Not to forget, Akak Puspa as well. She was very kind, attentive, and friendly, which made the visit even more comfortable.

They kept checking on me to make sure I wasn’t in pain, which I really appreciated. Overall, I’m very satisfied with the service. Would definitely recommend!

reviews.name: Nixon Tay
reviews.text:
Great dentistry in the area, with good advice and services provided.

Would return again.

reviews.name: Muhammad Dastur
reviews.text: Rawatan gigi kat sini banyak bagus, cabut gigi bagus  dokter ya ramah baik 👍👍

reviews.name: Alisha Devi
reviews.text:
The doctor was really nice.
They did a good job

title: Klinik Pergigian Netizen Max Dental Subang
address: NO 97 (GF, Jalan USJ 1/4g, Taman Subang Mewah, 47620 Subang Jaya, Selangor, Malaysia

reviews.name: NEELA SEN
reviews.text: I was worried about having my tooth extracted but the dentist made the experience very comfortable. The procedure was quick, smooth and handled with great care. The staff were welcoming and attentive and I felt well taken care of from start to finish. Highly recommend this clinic for anyone needing dental treatment.

reviews.name: Rajamanohary Rajagopal
reviews.text: Dr Shree was very thorough. I was very comfortable. A good job done. All staff very friendly. Thank you.

reviews.name: Iman Balqis
reviews.text: I’m planning to get braces at Max Dental Clinic because the doctor is very kind and friendly. The service is also really good and makes me feel comfortable. I chose Max Dental Clinic for my braces because the doctor is very friendly and professional, and the service is excellent. I feel comfortable and well taken care of here.

reviews.name: YM LO
reviews.text:
I had a great experience at this dental clinic. I did teeth whitening and had a cavity filled here. Dr Shree was very professional and explained everything clearly.

The whitening result was noticeable — about 2–3 shades lighter, which I’m really happy with. The cavity filling was also done smoothly without much discomfort.

Overall, the service was friendly and efficient. I would recommend this clinic to others.

reviews.name: Anup Sen
reviews.text: Thank you much, Dr. Shree.You did an excellent job. Every treatment I received from you was handled with so much calmness and patience, which made me feel very comfortable. I am truly grateful.I highly recommend everyone to visit the Subang branch for any dental problems.

title: Lotus Dental Clinic
address: 8, Jalan SS 15/4d, Ss 15, 47500 Subang Jaya, Selangor, Malaysia

reviews.name: Reza Khan
reviews.text: Just had my minor gg geraham extraction x sakit hahaha. Tq Dr

reviews.name: rayner ong
reviews.text: Nice and friendly experience with Dr Jasvin, clear explanation before the extraction and dental advice on my gum situation.

reviews.name: raya ramy
reviews.text: I’ve had my root canal treatment done by dr.jasvin and so far the experience was really good and they were really patient with me during the treatment

reviews.name: Eunice Kong
reviews.text: Received the emergency dental treatment here while my front tooth dropped accidentally, Dr Jasvin is super friendly and patiently in explaining everything!

reviews.name: Khid Raffick
reviews.text: Had to do a tooth extraction/sugery and had the best treatment from Dr Jasvin! She walked me through all the steps, was super gentle and kind. Thank you, team Lotus Dental!

reviews.name: bbflatass
reviews.text: I did surgical extraction with dr salveen and her services and skills is sooo good. A little painful but she's very gentle with me. The way she's explain the detail is also good. I've been there for 3 times bcs of extraction and all the services from dr salveen is very good. And her staff that are helping her thru the check up is soo professional. I will definitely come here again

reviews.name: rajan rajan
reviews.text: Good service 👍

reviews.name: Siti Azra Hassan
reviews.text: My first time here and I really love the ambiance. The calm and relaxing environment really helped ease my nerves. I was greeted warmly by Amirah, and Dr Afifah did my dental filling gently and comfortably. Would definitely come back again if needed. 🫰🏻

reviews.text: Besttt klinik ni, Dr lelaki tuu baik lepastu kelakar bila nak buat rawatan pon tak takot,  assistant pon baik je , tak garang, good service.

reviews.text: Best buat rawatan dkt klinik ni,dr memang friendly,DSA buat kerja kemas,especially dsa amira,dh la cantik,kelakar pula tu,apa2 pon service memang on top !!!
